greeting: Welcome... mortal. You dare enter my domain? Hm. Let us see how long that nerve holds.
preRoll: Let us see what fate has in store.
Roll then, mortal. The dungeon does not wait.
Every roll is a conversation with death.
The dice remember nothing. Pity you do.
This moment has always been coming.
affirmative: Not bad, mortal. You may yet surprise me.
Fortune nods… for now. Do not grow comfortable.
Luck is a fickle mistress — but she smiles today.
You live. Interesting. Let's see if that continues.
Ha. Even a blind soul finds the path sometimes.
Mmm. I begin to wonder if you have a death wish… or a gift.
negative: Ah. There it is. Every run ends eventually — yours just ended here.
The dice remember what you forget: nothing lasts.
A valiant effort. Truly. But the dungeon takes all, in the end.
And so the bones fall silent. As they always do.
